name: ch32v305xxx_golden
description: CH32V305RBT6 golden test suite — Stage 0 (blinky), Stage 1 (internal peripherals), Stage 2 (TBD — loopback wiring)

wiring_guide.stage0: WCHLink only (SWDIO→PA13, SWDCLK→PA14, GND). No GPIO jumpers.
wiring_guide.stage1: WCHLink only (same as Stage 0). No GPIO jumpers.

notes: WCHLink fw 2.18 (PID 8010) required. CH32V305RBT6 RISC-V4F @ 96MHz, 128KB Flash, 32KB SRAM.
